## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/ci.sh` passes locally (fmt, build, tests, dogfood)
- [ ] `zig fmt` has been run (`zig fmt --check src test build.zig` is clean)
- [ ] Tests added/updated — every bug fix has a regression test that fails
      before the fix
- [ ] Specs in `docs/` updated to match any behavior change (CLI, config,
      operators, report formats, doctest, error codes)
- [ ] Output stays deterministic (stable ordering, stable IDs, normalized paths)
- [ ] No new ADR conflict, or a superseding ADR is included
